title: Justice Court Jurisdiction
description: This bill addresses justice court jurisdiction.

title: Ballot Proposition Amendments
description: This bill amends election provisions regarding a proposed constitutional amendment.

title: Statewide Initiative and Referendum Amendments
description: This bill, contingent on the passage of a constitutional amendment, extends the amount of time that the sponsors of a referendum petition have to gather signatures to qualify the referendum for the ballot.

title: Proposal to Amend Utah Constitution - Voter Legislative Power
description: This joint resolution of the Utah Legislature proposes to amend the Utah Constitution to modify provisions relating to voter powers.
